PROP-baseauction-asm-002.text: Bidders are untrusted; all bid parameters (asset, amount, data) must be fully validated before execution.
PROP-baseauction-asm-002.assertion: forall bid(asset, amount, data): validate(auctionLive, bidValue, balance) before any transfer

locations.note: All validation (auction live, bid value, balance) must precede safeTransfer
